---
title: "OrgTree — Identity Modernization"
subtitle: "x.500 AD Hierarchy to Flat Entra ID"
---

## The Problem

Active Directory organized identity into a deep x.500 tree. Entra ID flattened
all of that into a single directory with no hierarchy. The OrgTree suite bridges
that gap by encoding organizational structure into attributes, dynamic groups,
and Administrative Units.

## The A-Z Suite

| ID | Topic |
|----|-------|
| MOD_001 | Executive Summary |
| MOD_A | OrgPath Codebook |
| MOD_B | Dynamic Group Templates |
| MOD_C | Attribute Mappings (x.500 to flat) |
| MOD_D | Delegation Model (OU to AU) |
| MOD_E–MOD_Z | Full appendix suite |

::: {.callout-tip}
Source files: `src/uiao/modernization/orgtree/`
:::
